phases.name: Docker + Laravel Scaffold + Auth & RBAC
phases.description: Docker infrastructure, Laravel scaffold, authentication with Sanctum, role-based access control, data scopes, audit logging, service account support

phases.name: Music Library
phases.description: Full CRUD for songs, albums, playlists with publish lifecycle, semantic versioning, cover art upload, tag management, and full-text search

phases.name: User Behavior & Analytics
phases.description: Event collection with 5-second deduplication, profile modeling with exponential decay (30-day half-life), cold-start and personalized recommendations

phases.name: Notifications & Task Center
phases.description: In-app notification system with template rendering, bulk delivery (10k cap), rate limiting (3/hr/user/template), subscriptions, read receipts

phases.name: Rewards/Penalties
phases.description: Evaluation cycles, leader profiles, configurable reward/penalty types, disciplinary records with state machine (active→appealed→cleared), expiration, statistics

phases.name: Result Entry (Lab-style Data Collection)
phases.description: Structured measurement entry with 9-step validation pipeline, unit normalization, z-score outlier flagging, reviewer sign-off, CSV import, FHIR-inspired batch API

phases.name: Cross-cutting Concerns
phases.description: Structured JSON logging with request correlation, Auditable trait on 10 models, field masking for PII, nightly MySQL backups with 30-day retention, scheduled tasks
